## Checklist
- [ ] `make check` passes (selfcheck + tests + compile)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated
- [ ] Docs updated (and an ADR added for significant decisions)
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`…)
